title: Ubiquiti Pro XG 8 PoE switch
description: The UniFi Switch USW-Pro-XG-8-PoE is a compact, fully managed L3 PoE switch with a switching capacity of 200 Gbps , (8) 10-Gigabit LAN ports, and two SFP+ (10Gbps) ports. All Ethernet ports support PoE++ 802.3af/at/bt PoE-Out with an output power of up to 60W/port and a total PoE budget of 155 W . The ports feature the Etherlighting function, allowing you to illuminate ports in color to display port location, speed/link, and VLAN. The switch is powered by a power adapter and has a maximum power… (8) 10G ports â supports 802.3af/at/bt PoE++ (60W/port) (2) 1/10G SFP+ ports 155 W PoE budget Etherlighting â visual port status indication Desktop or wall-mount installation Managed via UniFi Network server The USW-Pro-XG-8-PoE has no web management interface but is centrally managed via the UniFi Network server with support for the UniFi mobile app. It offers an extensive suite of advanced Layer 2 switching protocols and features, including per-port operational modes (switching, mirroring, or aggregation). The UniFi Network server and mobile app allow administrators to configure and monitor virtually all switch functions through a graphical user interface from anywhere Device Power adapter Wall-mount kit
